creator: freebsd@bitter-almonds.com
text:
Created attachment 238061
Add run time dependency on "www/py-cachecontrol"

OP reported that "inkscape" crashed, after installing "py-requests", for want of "cachecontrol" module ...

  https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-questions/2022-November/002317.html

... Attached patch adds run time dependency on "www/py-cachecontrol" port[0]; bumps PORTREVISION.


0- "www/py-cachecontrol" is duplicated in "devel/py-cachecontrol"; https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=266640 .
